name: 数据呈现
subject: math
domain_name: 统计与概率 / Statistics & Probability / Statistics & Probability
curriculum_points:
SL 1.2
Content
Arithmetic sequences and series.
Use of the formulae for the nth term and the sum of the first n terms of the sequence.
Use of sigma notation for sums of arithmetic sequences.
Applications.

SL 1.3
Content
Geometric sequences and series.
Use of the formulae for the n th term and the sum of the first n terms of the sequence.
Use of sigma notation for the sums of geometric sequences.
Applications.

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「数据呈现」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：SL 1.2
Content
Arithmetic sequences and series.
Use of the formulae for the nth term and the sum of the first n terms of…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：SL 1.3
Content
Geometric sequences and series.
Use of the formulae for the n th … 对理解「数据呈现」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
